# Tool catalog

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-tools-catalog.mjs — do not edit by hand.
     Regenerate with: npm run gen:tools -->

5 tools registered through the manifest contract
([docs/PUBLIC_TOOL_ECOSYSTEM.md](docs/PUBLIC_TOOL_ECOSYSTEM.md)). Add yours:
[CONTRIBUTING_TOOLS.md](CONTRIBUTING_TOOLS.md).

Every webhook tool below is **model-callable in the chat loop** as
`<id>__<fn>` on direct chat turns (marketplace phase M2), in addition to its
`POST /api/tools/<id>` bridge endpoint. BYOK tools whose secrets aren't
configured on the server are stripped from the model's tool list per request.

| id | Label | What | Functions | Category | Pricing | Upstream | Maintainer |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `weather` | Weather | Current conditions and 3-day forecast for any place | `get_weather` | data | keyless | [wttr.in](https://github.com/chubin/wttr.in) (Apache-2.0) | @ilianherzi |
| `calculator` | Calculator | Exact math, unit conversion, and percentages | `calculate` | productivity | keyless | [mathjs](https://github.com/josdejong/mathjs) (Apache-2.0) | @ilianherzi |
| `stock_quote` | Stocks | Live stock, index, FX, and crypto quotes | `stock_quote` | finance | keyless | [yahoo-finance2](https://github.com/gadicc/yahoo-finance2) (MIT) | @ilianherzi |
| `web_scrape` | Web scrape | Read any web page as markdown, or search the web | `scrape_url`, `search_web` | data | byok | [Firecrawl](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl) (AGPL-3.0) | @ilianherzi |
| `tts` | Text to speech | Turn text into lifelike spoken audio (ElevenLabs, BYOK — vendor bills per character; free tier 10k chars/mo) | `text_to_speech`, `list_voices` | media | byok | — | @ilianherzi |
